name: @gramatr/mcp
description: grāmatr — Intelligence middleware for AI agents. Pre-classifies every request, injects relevant memory and behavioral context, enforces data quality, and maintains session continuity across Claude, ChatGPT, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, and any MCP-compatible client.

scripts.test:orchestration: docker build -f test/smoke/Dockerfile.orchestration -t gramatr-orch-smoke ../../../ && docker run --rm gramatr-orch-smoke
scripts.test:orchestration:setup: rm -f gramatr-mcp-*.tgz && npm pack --pack-destination . && mv gramatr-mcp-*.tgz gramatr-mcp.tgz && docker build -f test/smoke/Dockerfile.orchestration-functional -t gramatr-orch-functional ../../../ && rm -f gramatr-mcp.tgz && docker volume create orch-claude-auth && docker volume create orch-gramatr-state && docker run -it --rm -v orch-claude-auth:/home/gramatr/.claude -v orch-gramatr-state:/home/gramatr/.gramatr gramatr-orch-functional ./orch-setup.sh
scripts.test:orchestration:functional: rm -f gramatr-mcp-*.tgz && npm pack --pack-destination . && mv gramatr-mcp-*.tgz gramatr-mcp.tgz && docker build -f test/smoke/Dockerfile.orchestration-functional -t gramatr-orch-functional ../../../ && rm -f gramatr-mcp.tgz && docker run --rm -v orch-claude-auth:/home/gramatr/.claude -v orch-gramatr-state:/home/gramatr/.gramatr gramatr-orch-functional ./orch-test.sh
scripts.test:orchestration:shell: rm -f gramatr-mcp-*.tgz && npm pack --pack-destination . && mv gramatr-mcp-*.tgz gramatr-mcp.tgz && docker build -f test/smoke/Dockerfile.orchestration-functional -t gramatr-orch-functional ../../../ && rm -f gramatr-mcp.tgz && docker run -it --rm -v orch-claude-auth:/home/gramatr/.claude -v orch-gramatr-state:/home/gramatr/.gramatr gramatr-orch-functional bash
